config.name: KeywordCoverage
config.description: 8 mechanic-focused decks x 4 AIs = 32 pairs, cross-round-robin. Each deck is engineered to force a specific under-served keyword or ability kind into play: bulwark-mend (Mend N OnEnter + Heal), bulwark-peak (Peak/Resonance tier triggers + Sentinel grant), ember-burn-ignite (Ignite StartOfYourTurn + Kindle + Resonance tiers), thorn-sprawl-tokens (Sprawl tokens + CreateToken + Kindle fire), thorn-rally-force (Rally OnArenaEnter + Force auras), hollow-phantom-fade (Phantom StartOfClash + ScheduleAt + PhantomReturn), hollow-pilfer-shroud (Shroud TargetLegality + Pilfer), tide-drift-recur-reshape (Drift EndOfYourTurn + Recur Replacement + Reshape swap). The stochastic search over 8 decks gives every declared keyword a realistic chance to cast in at least one run; use the CCGNF_CAST_LOG env var + tools/cast-log-summary.py to verify which mechanics fired. RUN: start REST with 'export CCGNF_AI_EDITOR=1 CCGNF_CAST_LOG=ai-testing-data/keyword-coverage.cast.jsonl && make rest', then 'make bench-run TOURNAMENT=KeywordCoverage OUT=ai-testing-data/keyword-coverage.results.json'. ANALYSE: 'python3 tools/cast-log-summary.py ai-testing-data/keyword-coverage.cast.jsonl'.

notes: Close race: 'FoTD' edges out runner-up by 8 points — consider more games per matchup.
59 matchup(s) drew ≥ 40% of games — worth inspecting for stall states.
